gifts.name: Statue of Liberty Replica
gifts.description: A meticulously crafted miniature bronze Statue of Liberty, symbolizing the iconic symbol of freedom and American optimism. Hand-painted with aged patina finish.

gifts.name: New York Style Bagels Gift Box
gifts.description: Authentic New York-style boiled bagels from a legendary NYC bakery, shipped same-day. Includes sesame, everything, and plain varieties with cream cheese.

gifts.name: Broadway Show Ticket Voucher
gifts.description: A premium gift experience allowing the recipient to attend a world-class Broadway performance in the Theater District. Includes orchestra seating.

gifts.name: Manhattan Skyline Art Print
gifts.description: High-quality archival giclée print of the Manhattan skyline at sunset, printed on 300gsm cotton rag paper. Custom framing available.

gifts.name: Financier Whiskey Selection
gifts.description: A curated selection of premium small-batch American whiskeys, including limited releases from Brooklyn and Hudson Valley craft distilleries.

gifts.name: Golden Gate Bridge Crystal Paperweight
gifts.description: Hand-blown glass paperweight featuring an intricate laser-etched Golden Gate Bridge silhouette suspended in crystallized mineral oil.

gifts.name: Ghirardelli Chocolate Collection
gifts.description: Luxury gift box featuring Ghirardelli's renowned artisan chocolates, including 72% dark chocolate squares and sea salt caramels.

gifts.name: Cable Car Music Box
gifts.description: A vintage-style mechanical music box playing 'I Left My Heart in San Francisco' with a miniature hand-painted cable car.

gifts.name: Sausalito Lavender Sachets
gifts.description: Organic lavender sachets handcrafted in Sausalito, filled with locally grown Provence-style lavender. Comes with a silk ribbon.

gifts.name: Napa Valley Wine Gift Set
gifts.description: A premium selection of Napa Valley wines including Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay, presented in a wooden gift box.

gifts.name: Café du Monde Beignets Sampler
gifts.description: Authentic Café du Mondebeignets and chicory coffee mix, the legendary taste of New Orleans. Packaged in a collectible tin.

gifts.name: Louisiana Crawfish Seasoning Set
gifts.description: A set of four artisanal Louisiana spice blends including crawfish boil, blackening seasoning, jambalaya Roux, and Creole rub.

gifts.name: Mardi Gras Mask Art
gifts.description: Hand-constructed Venetian-style masquerade mask with Swarovski crystals and hand-painted gold leaf, created by New Orleans artisans.

gifts.name: Preservation Hall Jazz Recording
gifts.description: A limited-edition vinyl record from Preservation Hall Jazz Band, featuring classic New Orleans jazz with archival photographs.

gifts.name: Voodoo Spirituality Set
gifts.description: An authentic New Orleans voodoo starter kit including hand-poured candles, ceremonial herbs, and a guide to Louisiana spiritual traditions.

gifts.name: Ladurée Macaron Collection
gifts.description: An elegant gift box of 24 hand-crafted Ladurée macarons in classic flavors including rose, violet, caramel, and chocolate.

gifts.name: Eiffel Tower Crystal Ornament
gifts.description: A Baccarat crystal miniature Eiffel Tower with hand-etched details and 24k gold accents, presented in a velvet-lined box.

gifts.name: Parfums de Nicola Fragrance
gifts.description: A signature Parisian perfume custom-blended by artisan perfumers in Le Marais, with notes of iris, jasmine, and Parisian roses.

gifts.name: Montmartre Artist Watercolor Set
gifts.description: A professional watercolor set with hand-ground pigments from Montmartre artists' suppliers, including a sketchbook from a local paper mill.

gifts.name: Hermès Silk Scarf
gifts.description: An authentic Hermès silk twill scarf with hand-rolled edges, featuring classic Parisian motifs. Made in Lyon, France.

gifts.name: Fortnum & Mason Tea Selection
gifts.description: The prestigious Royal Warrant holder's finest loose-leaf teas including Darjeeling, Earl Grey, and their exclusive Royal Blend.

gifts.name: Thornes Piccadilly Chocolates
gifts.description: Luxury English chocolates from the historic Thornton's store, including handcrafted truffles and butterscotch.

gifts.name: Big Ben Clock Replica
gifts.description: A handcrafted brass working clock inspired by the Elizabeth Tower, with Westminster chimes and a mahogany base.

gifts.name: Burberry Trench Coat Belt
gifts.description: An authentic Burberry leather belt with the signature check pattern, crafted in England with brass buckle.

gifts.name: Royal Albert Bone China Cup Set
gifts.description: A fine bone china tea for two set with hand-painted roses, made in Stoke-on-Trent. Includes saucers and matching teapot.

gifts.name: Murano Glass Centerpiece
gifts.description: Hand-blown Murano glass vase with authentic millefiori pattern, created by master glassmakers on the island of Murano near Venice.

gifts.name: Michelearena Leather Journal
gifts.description: Handstitched Italian leather journal with Florentine tooling, filled with 200 pages of deckle-edged cotton paper.

gifts.name: Valpolicella Wine Gift Set
gifts.description: A collection of premium Veneto wines including Amarone and Valpolicella Classico in a handwoven straw basket.

gifts.name: Vatican Rosetta Stone Replica
gifts.description: A museum-quality replica of the Vatican's Rosetta Stone with hieroglyphic inscriptions, made from cast marble resin.

gifts.name: Tuscan Olive Oil Collection
gifts.description: Cold-pressed extra virgin olive oil from Chianti Classico estates, presented in hand-painted ceramic bottles.

gifts.name: Imperial Silk Scroll Painting
gifts.description: Hand-painted traditional Chinese brush scroll featuring imperial scenes, created by artists in the style of the Ming Dynasty.

gifts.name: Jingju Face Mask Opera
gifts.description: Authentic Beijing Opera face masks hand-painted with symbolic colors representing different character traits from Chinese theater.

gifts.name: Temple of Heaven Cloisonné Enamel
gifts.description: Fine Chinese cloisonné enamel vessel with traditional imperial dragon patterns, crafted using ancient techniques.

gifts.name: Peking Opera Singing Set
gifts.description: A complete beginner's set for Peking opera singing including handmade erhu, traditional costume fabric, and instructional DVD.

gifts.name: Ming Dynasty Style Porcelain Tea Set
gifts.description: Authentic replica of Ming Dynasty imperial porcelain with cobalt blue patterns, featuring teapot and six cups in a wooden box.

gifts.name: The Bund Art Deco Lamp
gifts.description: A vintage-style Art Deco table lamp inspired by 1930s Shanghai architecture, with brass base and stained glass shade.

gifts.name: Shanghai Tong Lor Spa Set
gifts.description: Traditional Chinese aromatherapy spa set including foot bath herbs, jade roller, and silk eye pillow from local artisans.

gifts.name: Nanhai Embroidery Panel
gifts.description: Fine Suzhou-style silk embroidery featuring traditional Chinese landscape scenes, hand-stitched by master embroiderers.

gifts.name: French Concession Wine Selection
gifts.description: A curated selection of Chinese and French wines from Shanghai's former French Concession, presented in a silk-lined box.

gifts.name: Old Shanghai Jazz Record Collection
gifts.description: Vintage jazz recordings from Shanghai's 1930s era featuring the jazz age of old Shanghai with original album artwork.

gifts.name: Victoria Harbour Diamond Model
gifts.description: A precision-crafted 24k gold-plated scale model of the Hong Kong skyline with working LED lights simulating Victoria Harbour.

gifts.name: Dim Sum Cooking Kit
gifts.description: Premium dim sum making kit including bamboo steamers, quality wrappers, and authentic ingredients with recipes from Michelin-starred chefs.

gifts.name: Silk Phoenix Embroidery
gifts.description: Hand-embroidered silk tapestry featuring the mythical Chinese phoenix, a symbol of grace and prosperity, in traditional Cantonese style.

gifts.name: Wellington Building Crystal Paperweight
gifts.description: A lead crystal paperweight featuring an etched miniature of Hong Kong's iconic clock tower, handcrafted in Bohemia.

gifts.name: Hong Kong Craft Beer Selection
gifts.description: A curated selection of Hong Kong craft beers including local IPAs and stouts from Hong Kong's emerging microbrewery scene.
